---
title: "Modelagem matemática"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-14"
---


Primer of Ecology using R

https://hankstevens.github.io/Primer-of-Ecology/index.html


Interspecific competition model

https://www2.nau.edu/lrm22/lessons/competition/competition.html

https://bio.libretexts.org/Courses/Gettysburg_College/01%3A_Ecology_for_All/15%3A_Competition/15.05%3A_Quantifying_Competition_Using_the_Lotka-Volterra_Model


https://github.com/hplgit/fdm-book
https://hplgit.github.io/

Vídeos aula Flávia Bastos

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBjsIqt9Y_dA-KTONlPqB3dniwAmldbAL


https://insightmaker.com/docs/predatorprey
